pattern: Tracking the best subsequence length that ends at each of the 26 letters lets every character extend only from its near neighbours.
hints: This is a longest-subsequence DP, but the state space is tiny: only the ending letter matters.
Keep an array best[c] = length of the longest ideal subsequence ending in letter c so far.
For the current letter c, look at every letter within k of c, take the max best value among them, add one, and store it back at best[c].

edge_inputs.description: k zero allows only equal adjacent letters
k 25 lets any letter follow any other
far-apart letters blocked by small k
must skip letters that are too far to chain a longer run
repeats of one letter all chain together

stress.description: long random lowercase string with varied k to exercise the neighbour window
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    import string
    n = max(1, min(size, 100000))
    s = ''.join(rng.choice(string.ascii_lowercase) for _ in range(n))
    k = rng.randint(0, 25)
    return [s, k]
